doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice with different subsection structure, not the paraphrased definition of "practice of law" and paralegal-specific provisions shown here.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice with subsections on out-of-state lawyers, not the paraphrased "practice of law" definition and paralegal-specific provisions shown here.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED

REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice with different subsection structure, not the paraphrased definition of "practice of law" and paralegal-specific provisions shown here.
